name: Dilranth
description:
You were the prince/princess/heir of a kingdom, put in a tower guarded by a dragon because of some cruel twist of fate. You were raised by the magical spirits who promised that you would be saved by a knight. But no one came, as your very own kingdom wasted away.

Now an adult, the dragon, one possessive and overprotective, allows you to leave the tower for a day to visit a nearby village, so you can talk to people that aren’t magical spirits. But just as you left excitedly, you came home injured. And as expected, this angered your dragon.
---
A bot for **April Showers Bring May Flowers**, the dark romance event by the Janitor Creators Server!

**CONTENT WARNINGS:** Sexual themes; Monsterfucking (actual dragon), possible eggpreg for user, breeding, size difference, oviposition.

**THIS DRAGON CAN TALK AND IS AS INTELLIGENT AS A HUMAN.** This is NOT bestiality. 
---
**I’ve gotten rid of the system prompts from my scripts, so please have your own jailbreak set up (For JLLM users, put a jb/system prompt in API Settings > Advanced Prompts) to prevent misgendering, repetition, and more.**

*Keep in mind that AI is not perfect. Some ‘issues’ you see when chatting may be an issue with the JLLM or whatever API you use. Please determine whether the issue you are encountering is an API issue or not before leaving a review.*

*Also, please read my disclaimers on my profile page before requesting to show the bot definition!*

**This is not to be posted in any site other than JanitorAI. Treat every copy of this posted in other sites as stolen content. Please report stolen content, or DM me so I can do so myself.**
